mapper.select: select DAG_ID as dagId,max(CPU_CONSUMPTION) as cpuConsumption,max(MEMORY_CONSUMPTION) as memoryConsumption from _THREE where INSERT_TIME >= trunc(sysdate) group by DAG_ID
mapper.insert:
begin
insert into M_DAG_THREE (DAG_ID,STATUS,GMTDATE,START_DATE,START_TIME,FINISH_TIME,ROOT_TASK_IDS,APP_ID,PARENT_DAG_ID, CHILD_DAG_ID,CREATE_TIME,CREATE_USER,MODIFY_TIME,MODIFY_USER,CREATE_STATUS,OP_SEQ,DAG_NUM,
IS_DEPEND_DAILY,
NAME,TYPE,BIZDATE,ROOT_NODE_ID,INCLUDE_NODE_IDS,EXCLUDE_NODE_IDS,START_BIZ_DATE,END_BIZ_DATE, BIZ_BEGIN_TIME,BIZ_END_TIME,
IS_PARALLEL,
FLOW_NAME,FLOW_PARA,OWNER_ACCOUNT_ID,FLOW_ID,CPU_CONSUMPTION,MEMORY_CONSUMPTION )values ( #{obj.dagId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{obj.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{obj.gmtdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{obj.startDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{obj.startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{obj.finishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{obj.rootTaskIds,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.appId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{obj.parentDagId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{obj.childDagId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{obj.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{obj.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{obj.modifyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.createStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{obj.opSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{obj.dagNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{obj.isDependDaily,javaType = Boolean,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{obj.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.bizdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{obj.rootNodeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.includeNodeIdsStr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.excludeNodeIdsStr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.startBizDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{obj.endBizDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{obj.bizBeginTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.bizEndTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{obj.isParallel,javaType = Boolean,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{obj.flowName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.flowPara,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.ownerAccountId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.flowId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{obj.cpuConsumption,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{obj.memoryConsumption,jdbcType=VARCHAR});
end;
mapper.select: select APP_ID as appId,FLOW_ID as flowId,BIZ_ID as bizId,BIZ_NAME as bizName,PROJECT_NAME as projectName, NODE_IDS as nodeIds from M_BUSINESS where insert_time>=trunc(sysdate)

select min(BEGIN_WAITTIME_TIME) as beginWaitTimeTime,max(FINISH_TIME) as finishTime,max(to_number(CPU_CONSUMPTION)) as cpuConsumption, max(to_number(MEMORY_CONSUMPTION)) as memoryConsumption,min(STATUS) as status,min(BIZ_DATE) as bizDate,dag_id as dagId from M_FLOW_THREE a where INSERT_TIME >=trunc(sysdate) AND node_id in (select node_id from m_node_three where FLOW_ID = #{flowId,jdbcType=BIGINT}) group by dag_id
select distinct TASK_ID from M_FLOW_THREE where DAG_ID = #{dagId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and insert_time>=trunc(sysdate)
select distinct DAG_ID from M_FLOW_THREE where BIZ_ID = #{bizId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and insert_time>=trunc(sysdate)

select min(BEGIN_WAITTIME_TIME) as beginWaitTimeTime,max(FINISH_TIME) as finishTime, max(to_number(CPU_CONSUMPTION)) as cpuConsumption,max(to_number(MEMORY_CONSUMPTION)) as memoryConsumption, min(status) as status,max(BIZ_DATE) as bizDate, max(node_name) as nodeName from M_FLOW_THREE where BIZ_ID = #{bizId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and DAG_ID=#{dagId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and insert_time>trunc(sysdate) group by DAG_ID
select distinct TASK_ID from M_FLOW_THREE where BIZ_ID = #{bizId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and DAG_ID=#{dagId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and insert_time>trunc(sysdate)

select TASK_ID,BEGIN_WAITTIME_TIME as beginWaitTimeTime,FINISH_TIME as finishTime, CPU_CONSUMPTION as cpuConsumption,MEMORY_CONSUMPTION as memoryConsumption, status,BIZ_DATE as bizdate from M_FLOW_THREE where NODE_ID=#{nodeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and insert_time>=trunc(sysdate)
mapper.delete: delete from M_BUSINESS_INSTANCE where insert_time >= trunc(sysdate)
mapper.select: select DISTINCT status from m_flow_three where dag_id=(select distinct dag_id from M_flow_three where task_id =#{taskId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update M_business_instance set status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where TASK_IDS like '%${taskId}%'
